assertions.text: Table has at least one column name ending with '?' (e.g. 'Discount?' or 'Expected?')
assertions.evidence: Column header 'Discount?' appears in the table

assertions.text: Table has exactly 3 data rows (GOLD, SILVER, BRONZE)
assertions.evidence: Three rows present: 'Gold customer | GOLD | 100 | 20', 'Silver customer | SILVER | 100 | 10', 'Bronze customer | BRONZE | 100 | 0'

assertions.text: Test method body contains only one assertEquals (or equivalent assertion) — not three
assertions.evidence: Method body contains exactly: 'assertEquals(discount, discountService.calculate(tier, orderAmount));'

assertions.text: Test method body contains no if or switch statements
assertions.evidence: Method body is a single assertEquals call with no conditional logic

assertions.text: Table has a scenario/description column as the leftmost column
assertions.evidence: 'Scenario' is the leftmost column header in the table
